name: self-writing-boundary
description: Closes the downstream self-improvement boundary-erosion class: an agent or a careless edit weakening the project-local self-writing boundary so that downstream self-improvement could reach the parent template, sibling repos, global config, or secrets. This contract asserts the boundary contract still states each forbidden-write rule, that the downstream protocol keeps promotion maintainer-gated, and that apply-local-self-improvement.sh still carries the write-scope and role refusal guard.

states-write-scope-rule.regex_present: only inside the current repo root
